Title: Ascension of the Lord | Mass Readings Reflection
Theme: Christ ascends and sends the Church in hope
Short Description: The Ascension teaches the Church to live between promise and mission.
Body:
Jesus does not leave His Church abandoned. In the Ascension, He returns to the Father while entrusting His disciples with mission, prayer, and hope.

The readings hold together promise and responsibility. Christ reigns, the Church waits for the Holy Spirit, and the faithful are sent into the world with confidence rather than fear.
Spiritual Invitation: Ask where Christ is sending you today, and answer Him in one concrete act of faith, charity, or witness.
Prayer: Lord Jesus, lift my heart toward heaven and make me faithful in the mission You have entrusted to me. Amen.
Notes: Use Scripture references only, not full copyrighted readings text.
